questions.question: What is the key philosophical difference between Instantly and Smartlead?

options.text: Instantly is free while Smartlead is paid
Instantly is built for speed and simplicity; Smartlead is built for control and customization with API access
Instantly only supports email while Smartlead supports all channels
Smartlead has better deliverability than Instantly

questions.explanation: Instantly is built for speed and simplicity, assuming you want to launch campaigns fast. Smartlead is built for control and customization, assuming you'll want API access, custom webhooks, and white-label capabilities. For 90% of solo founders, Instantly wins on simplicity.

questions.question: What does Instantly's Growth plan ($37/month) include for solo founders?

options.text: Unlimited email accounts, 5,000 active contacts, 5,000 emails/month, unlimited warmup, and A/B testing
1 email account, unlimited emails, no analytics

questions.explanation: Instantly's Growth plan at $37/month includes unlimited email accounts, 5,000 active contacts, 5,000 emails/month, unlimited built-in warmup, unlimited campaigns, A/B testing with up to 26 variants, AI Writer, Lead Finder (1,000 B2B leads/month), and standard analytics.

questions.question: When should you choose Smartlead over Instantly?

options.text: When you need API integration, custom webhooks, or white-label capabilities
When you're just starting out with cold email
When you want the cheapest option available

questions.explanation: Choose Smartlead only if you can articulate a specific technical need like API integration, custom webhook routing, or white-label capabilities. If you can't articulate that need, choose Instantly — it's $2/month cheaper, has better A/B testing, and a cleaner interface.

questions.question: You should start sending cold emails immediately after connecting your domains to Instantly, without waiting for warmup.
questions.explanation: False. Skipping warmup is one of the most common configuration mistakes that tanks deliverability. New domains need 14-30 days of warmup (building reputation through simulated positive engagement) before sending cold emails. Sending immediately from a new domain triggers spam filters.

questions.question: Based on your current outreach needs (volume, technical requirements, budget), which platform would you choose — Instantly or Smartlead? Explain your reasoning with specific features that matter for your use case.
questions.aiPrompt: Evaluate whether the response makes a clear platform choice with specific reasoning tied to their situation (volume needs, technical comfort, budget constraints). Look for mention of key differentiators like API access, A/B testing, warmup, and pricing. Penalize generic answers that don't reference their specific needs.
